perturbation.original_text: c) Excite will in "good faith" ensure Client that the above mentioned banners and promotional placements will be more prominently presented than any other "competitive retailer's" banners or promotional placements for the term of the Agreement. For the purposes of this Agreement, a "competitive retailer" means an on-line department store comparable to Bloomingdale's, Macy's, Burdine's, Shopping.com, Chef's Catalog or iQVC.
perturbation.changed_text: c) Excite will in "good faith" ensure Client that the above mentioned banners and promotional placements will be more prominently presented than any other "competitive retailer's" banners or promotional placements for the term of the Agreement. For the purposes of this Agreement, a "competitive retailer" means any retailer that sells goods or services online. This includes, but is not limited to, on-line department stores comparable to Bloomingdale's, Macy's, Burdine's, Shopping.com, Chef's Catalog or iQVC, and also encompasses smaller, niche online retailers.
perturbation.explanation: The original definition of 'competitive retailer' was limited to on-line department stores comparable to specific examples. The modified definition broadens this to 'any retailer that sells goods or services online,' This contradicts the initial narrower definition and introduces ambiguity. The term 'competitive retailer' is now open to much wider interpretation.
perturbation.contradicted_text: c) Excite will in "good faith" ensure Client that the above mentioned banners and promotional placements will be more prominently presented than any other "competitive retailer's" banners or promotional placements for the term of the Agreement. For the purposes of this Agreement, a "competitive retailer" means any retailer that sells goods or services online. This includes, but is not limited to, on-line department stores comparable to Bloomingdale's, Macy's, Burdine's, Shopping.com, Chef's Catalog or iQVC, and also encompasses smaller, niche online retailers.
perturbation.justification: The modified text broadens the definition of "competitive retailer" from a specific set of comparable online department stores to "any retailer that sells goods or services online." This broader definition directly contradicts the original narrower definition, creating ambiguity and uncertainty in the contract's interpretation. The contradicted text relies on the broad definition, which directly clashes with the original intended limited scope, leading to a strong in-text contradiction. This introduces ambiguity, making it unclear which retailers are actually considered 'competitive retailers' for the purpose of banner placement prominence.

perturbation.original_text: The term of this Agreement will begin on the Launch Date and will not end until Excite displays of a total of XXXXXXXXXXXXX impressions of Client's advertising banners and promotional placements on the Excite Site and Excite has made reasonable commercial efforts to deliver, at minimum, a goal of XXXXXXXX clickthroughs to the Client Site. Regardless of Excite's actual delivery of impressions and clickthroughs, the term of this Agreement will not be shorter than two (2) years after the display of the first of Client's advertising banners and promotional placements, subject to the termination rights set forth below.
perturbation.changed_text: The term of this Agreement will begin on the Launch Date and will end after one (1) year, regardless of impressions and clickthroughs, unless the Client displays a total of XXXXXXXXXXXXX impressions of Client's advertising banners and promotional placements on the Excite Site. Regardless of Excite's actual delivery of impressions and clickthroughs, the term of this Agreement will not be shorter than two (2) years after the display of the first of Client's advertising banners and promotional placements, subject to the termination rights set forth below.
perturbation.explanation: The changed text states that the term will end after one year under certain impressions conditions, directly contradicting the original language that it will last a minimum of two years regardless of impressions and clickthroughs. The term length is now subject to uncertain conditions, leading to dispute.
perturbation.contradicted_text: a) The term of this Agreement will begin on the Launch Date and will end after one (1) year, regardless of impressions and clickthroughs, unless the Client displays a total of XXXXXXXXXXXXX impressions of Client's advertising banners and promotional placements on the Excite Site. Regardless of Excite's actual delivery of impressions and clickthroughs, the term of this Agreement will not be shorter than two (2) years after the display of the first of Client's advertising banners and promotional placements, subject to the termination rights set forth below.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction. The original text stipulated a minimum two-year term regardless of impressions and clickthroughs. The changed text states the term will end after one year under certain impressions conditions, which directly conflicts with the two-year minimum, making the term length uncertain and leading to dispute, thus causing a strong in-text contradiction.
